name: "➕ Submit an Opportunity"
about: "Use this template to submit a new competition, scholarship, hackathon or fellowship to nextECA."
title: "[SUBMISSION] <Opportunity Title Here>"
labels: ["submission", "needs-review"]
assignees: []
---

## 📋 Opportunity Details

**Title:**
<!-- e.g. Google Science Fair 2025 -->

**Category:**
<!-- Hackathon / Scholarship / Competition / Fellowship / Research / Olympiad / Exchange / Conference -->

**Organizing Body:**
<!-- e.g. NASA, Google, ICT Division Bangladesh -->

**Application Deadline:**
<!-- Format: YYYY-MM-DD e.g. 2025-11-30 -->

**Official Link:**
<!-- https://... -->

**Prize / Award:**
<!-- e.g. $10,000, Full scholarship, Certificate -->

**Location:**
<!-- e.g. Global, Dhaka Bangladesh, United Kingdom -->

**Mode:**
<!-- online / in-person / hybrid / international -->

**Level:**
<!-- national / international -->

**Description:**
<!--
2-4 sentences describing what the opportunity is, what participants do,
and why students should apply.
-->

**Eligibility:**
<!--
e.g. Bangladeshi nationals, undergraduate students, ages 18-25
-->

**Tags (comma-separated):**
<!--
e.g. STEM, Global, Fully Funded, Youth, Leadership
-->

**Tips for Applying (optional):**
<!--
Any tips for applicants from past participants or your own research.
-->

---

## ✅ Reviewer Checklist
<!-- For nextECA team use only -->
- [ ] Opportunity verified as legitimate
- [ ] Official link confirmed working
- [ ] Deadline confirmed correct
- [ ] Added to `data/opportunities.json`
- [ ] Site deployed and listing visible
